Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Hey, did you hear about that girl in 2-E?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Yeah, I heard they have no idea what happened.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Oh my god, isn't it so bizarre?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Man, everyone's talkin' about it. People sure got a lotta time on their hands.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Pfft, what, you think you one of them cool city slickers?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}C'mon, you gotta keep up with stuff like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}A girl from 2-E went missing while she was out late last night.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}And this morning, they found her lying in front of the school gate![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Nobody knows what happened, and supposedly she's still unconscious.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Man, this is a tough case, even for Junpei Iori, Ace Detective.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}More like Stupei, Ace Defective.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}Actually, now that I think about it, I haven't seen you all morning. Where've you been?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}I was talking to the teacher.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}That girl they found... I saw her yesterday, on my way back from practice.[n]{f 1 1}
